title: Boatspeed
description: Increases boat movement speed for faster water travel.
body:
Boat Speed lets you control how quickly boats accelerate.

The mod adds the `/boatspeed <value>` command. This command changes the boat acceleration multiplier: bigger values make boats gain speed faster, and smaller values make them accelerate more slowly.

For example, you can use it to make rivers, oceans, ice tracks, or server travel feel much faster without changing the rest of the game.
